text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph! You're not half bad!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same thing! I'm not giving up the next foothold to you,
though!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Don't you two dare forget about me! LET'S GOOO!

The three Umamusume throw themselves into ascending the cliff,
their sights set on the chapel.
All for the sake of proving their passion...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (I'm lacking oomph, huh? I'll show you oomph!)

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow, wow, wooow! Just when I thought I heard the pitter-patter of
pretty little footsteps, three lovely gems show up at my doorstep! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I'm not gonna let you turn me away this time!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: ...Oh my. ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: The time has come for you all to propose.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: But as a penalty, you must go last, Air Groove. ☆ Understood?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Understood.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
First up is Kawakami Princess. Tell me—what does racewear mean to
you? ☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
To me, racewear represents my ideal self... It is the proof of my vow
to become a princess with both elegance and dignity.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In order to become a lady worthy of exquisite attire and to be
discovered by my very own Prince Charming one day...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I vow to continue walking side by side with my racewear, no matter
how challenging the path may be!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: ...Hmmm, very good! ♪ What a lovely vow, my dear!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Next, Mejiro Dober. Let's hear your beautiful vow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a clear dream like Kawakami... but I do want to become a
better version of myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to be proud of myself and run my races with confidence. I want
to be able to do my very best against every opponent I meet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to become an undefeatable Umamusume who can stand against
even my role models and other Mejiro members—and for that, I need
my own racewear!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
To me, my racewear is an essential presence that supports and
propels me forward, lacking in confidence as I am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I may still be inexperienced, but I want to walk hand in hand with my
racewear, so I can bloom into my full potential one day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sorry... That was more of a wish than a vow.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I don't mind at all! ♪ I accept your unique proposal!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Now, last but not least...

text_block_list.name: Young Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then when I grow up, I'm going to be like you and get a first-rate
designer to create my very own racewear!

text_block_list.name: Young Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll wear a racing costume like yours and become a beautiful and
amazing Umamusume just like you, Mother!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It makes me so happy to hear you say that. ♪ In that case, I have to
cheer you on with all my might!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To me, racewear represents admiration. It is a symbol of what I strive
to become.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was a child, I've desired to become as beautiful as my
mother, and that desire has not waned.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One day, I will don a set of racewear just as beautiful as hers and
become the Empress who embodies the ideal Umamusume. And to
make that future a reality...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I vow to continue being someone worthy of her racewear... I swear to
pave the path we'll walk together with honor and glory.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. ♪ A wonderful fire has lit up in your eyes. ☆

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Now, it's time to announce the results of the audition...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Kawakami Princess, Mejiro Dober, and Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: You all pass!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I did it... I was chosen to be a muse!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oui! Félicitations, everyone! ♪ Please allow me to amend what I said
before, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Your beauty is most splendid. ♪ My fountain of inspiration is
positively overflowing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to seeing what you'll create. I'm sure our outfits
will be on equal footing with your master's work.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Quite right! You'd better be prepared for them. ☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Ms. Beauty, have you seen Mayano? She should've been
the first one to get here.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hm? You girls are the only ones to have reached the chapel so far.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun, right? I wonder what she is up to right now?
Hehe. ♪
